sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22949" key="guio/xalkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γυιόχαλκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n22949.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of brasen limb,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0208.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ara</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
